Package com.irurueta.geometry.io

Interface MeshWriterJsonListener

  • All Superinterfaces:
    MeshWriterListener
    public interface MeshWriterJsonListener
extends MeshWriterListener
    Specific implementation of a mesh writer listener prepared for JSON writer. This listener provides additional methods to handle textures.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.lang.String onRemoteTextureIdRequested​(MeshWriterJson writer, Texture texture, java.io.File textureFile)
      Handles texture to write ID to fetch it.
      java.lang.String onRemoteTextureUrlRequested​(MeshWriterJson writer, Texture texture, java.io.File textureFile)
      Handles texture to write URL where it will be located.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.irurueta.geometry.io.MeshWriterListener

        onChunkAvailable, onDidValidateTexture, onMaterialFileRequested, onTextureDataAvailable, onTextureDataProcessed, onTextureReceived, onValidateTexture, onWriteEnd, onWriteProgressChange, onWriteStart

    • Method Detail

      • onRemoteTextureUrlRequested

        java.lang.String onRemoteTextureUrlRequested​(MeshWriterJson writer,
                                             Texture texture,
                                             java.io.File textureFile)
        Handles texture to write URL where it will be located.
        Parameters:
        writer - reference to writer.
        texture - reference to texture being processed.
        textureFile - reference to file containing texture.
        Returns:
        URL where texture can be located.

      • onRemoteTextureIdRequested

        java.lang.String onRemoteTextureIdRequested​(MeshWriterJson writer,
                                            Texture texture,
                                            java.io.File textureFile)
        Handles texture to write ID to fetch it.
        Parameters:
        writer - reference to writer.
        texture - reference to texture being processed.
        textureFile - reference to file containing texture
        Returns:
        ID to locate texture.
